title: Style selection output
description: Structured output contract for the 8-step style-selection algorithm (stages 4-7). Emitted by the classifier stage before the full winning style markdown is loaded.

selected_style_id.description: The id of the winning style (matches _index.json[].id). Feeds Step 7 which reads the full style markdown.

scored_candidates.description: Top-15 candidates with rubric scores. Ordered descending by total. Selection picks from top-3 via weighted random (see scoring_hints).

id.description: Style id as present in skills/visionary/styles/_index.json.

subscores.description: Per-rubric-dimension scores. Keys are freeform rubric names (product_archetype, audience_density, brand_tone, motion_alignment, locale_fit, density_fit).

rationale.description: One sentence why this candidate survived the scoring stage.

rng_seed.description: Seed fed into the weighted-random pick over top-3. Recorded for determinism/replay tests.

blocked_ids.description: Style ids excluded before scoring because of system.md 'PERMANENTLY FLAGGED' state or explicit opt-out in the brief.

category_filter.description: Categories the filter stage admitted (historical, emotional, graphic, extended, hybrid, industry, ...). Empty array = all categories eligible.
